titleStmt.title: SII 35.86: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 86. (A.R. No. 72 of 1952-53.) BYĀHAṬṬI, HUBLI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up near the Chāvaḍi.
Palaeographically the record may be assigned to the 12th century A.D.
It stops abruptly after stating that the king's subordinate Mahāpradhāna Sēnādhipati Bāhattaraniyōgādhipati Kumāra-Paṇḍitayya was administering Veḷuvala Three Hundred.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarā
raṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē .
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvivallabha mahārājādhirāja pa
ramēśvara dvārāvatipuravarādhīśvaraṁ yādavakulāṁbara
dyumaṇi samyaktacūḍāmaṇi malerājarāja maleparoḷu
gaṁḍa gaṁḍabhēruṁḍa kadanapracaṁḍa sanivārasiddhi giridurggamalla ca
ladaṁkarāma niḥśaṁkapratāpacakravartti hoysaṇa vīraballāḷadēva vi
jayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ salu
ttamire . © tatpādapadmōpajīvi śrīmanmahāpradānaṁ sēnādhi
pati bāhattaraniyōgādhipati śrīmatkumārapaṁḍitayyadaṁḍanāya
karu beḷuvalamūnūṟumaṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ geyvu
ttamire .
Digital edition of SII 35.86 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
